title: PatchArtifact
description: Reference-only record of a completed patch unit's diff artifact. Never carries diff content inline — customer-proprietary highest sensitivity ('diff=소스').
$comment: compat_class: closed. Authority: approved plan §2 domain row 4 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5); docs/specs/SAENA_k3s_Package_and_Operations_Spec_v1.md §4.2:190-211 PatchUnitCompleted message skeleton (event_id/tenant_id/run_id/patch_unit_id/worktree_commit/manifest_uri/changed_files/quality_gate_ids/occurred_at — this domain contract is the underlying record the event payload derives its fields from, per contract/event relationship in docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md); docs/specs/SAENA_AEO_Algorithm_and_Harness_Design_v1.md §5.3 Proof-Carrying Change Set (evidence_ids = hunk<->evidence linkage: 'claim_id와 evidence_id', §11.1 diff-rationality link via contract_hash); docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P0 table 'PatchArtifact' row (Sensitivity 'customer-proprietary 최고 (diff=소스)').

worktree_commit.$comment: k3s §4.2:194 PatchUnitCompleted.worktree_commit. ADR-0013 appendix examples use short (7-char) sha forms for worktree-scoped commits rather than the full 40-hex git_sha $def used for repo_commit/base_commit — 7-40 hex accepted here (see also ADR-0023 worktree execution conventions).

base_commit.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list — the immutable repo commit the patch unit branched from (mirrors ChangePlan.repo_commit / SourceSnapshot.repo_commit).

artifact_uri.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list — reference to the diff artifact object, never inline content; uri_ref forbids query/fragment (R9-5, presigned-token smuggling defense).

artifact_hash.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list — integrity hash of the referenced diff artifact.

changed_files.$comment: k3s §4.2:197 PatchUnitCompleted.changed_files. Paths only, never content — same customer-proprietary boundary principle as SourceSnapshot (no raw content/listing fields).

evidence_ids.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list; Algorithm §5.3 Proof-Carrying Change Set — 'each diff hunk 는 claim_id와 evidence_id ... 와 연결된다'. minItems 1 enforces hunk<->evidence linkage at the artifact level.

contract_hash.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list — Algorithm §11.1 diff-rationality link: ties this artifact back to the ChangePlan instance that authorized it (mirrors ApprovalDecision.contract_hash).

rollback_ref.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list — Prompt package §7:370 'done condition' requires a rollback reference per completed patch unit (mirrors ChangePlan.patch_units[].rollback, e.g. 'git-revert:PU-01').

created_at.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 4 field list (parallels k3s §4.2 occurred_at, named created_at at the domain-record layer per §2 field spec).
